author: 0xunclebill
content:
lol thats funny. i was running this 

```
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: besu
      el_image: ethpandaops/besu:focil
  cl:
    - cl_type: lighthouse
      cl_image: eserilev/lighthouse:focil
    - cl_type: lodestar
      cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:focil
  count: 1

network_params:
  preset: minimal
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  heze_fork_epoch: 2

additional_services:
  - dora
  - tx_fuzz
  - spamoor

port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true
    public_port_start: 65500

spamoor_params:
  spammers:
    - scenario: eoatx
      config:
        throughput: 1
    - scenario: uniswap-swaps
      config:
        throughput: 1
    - scenario: blob-combined
      config:
        throughput: 0

global_log_level: debug
```

author: nflaig
content: these are 3 lighthouse proposers in a row though, so seems like lighthouse reorging itself, and 96 the lodestar block build on top of it, maybe easier to test if we don't have exactly 50/50 split of attesters

content: need to analyse attestations too to figure it out probably
